name: Spirulina Shake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ice cubes in a food processor or blender and blend until slushy.
2. Add the mashed banana to the blender and mix until evenly combined.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (spirulina, herbal liquid, and honey) in the blender and blend until smooth.
Nutrition (per serving):
189 calories
0 g saturated fat
1 g total fat (3% of calories)
2 g protein (3% of calories)
44 g carbohydrates (94% of calories)

1 g fiber
